Medicare Status Code – January through December 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates how a beneficiary currently qualifies for Medicare – January through December. 

LONG NAME: MDCR_STATUS_CD_01 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_02 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_03 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_04 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_05 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_06 
 MDCR_STATUS_CD_07 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_08 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_09 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_10 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_11 
MDCR_STATUS_CD_12 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 00 = Not
